description.value:
Archetype

You have mastered Haki to a degree few living beings have ever achieved. All three forms flow through you like breathing — constant, effortless, and absolute.

Observation:

  • Your precise sense range extends to 60 feet.
  • You gain the effect of true seeing (as the 7th-level spell) at all times — illusions, invisibility, and magical concealment cannot fool you.
  • Your Brief Future Sight (from Observation Mastery) can be used three times per day instead of once.

Armament:

  • While Armament Haki is active, you gain immunity to critical hits from physical attacks. Attacks still hit and deal normal damage; they simply cannot achieve a critical hit result against you.
  • Your Armament Haki now activates automatically at the start of each encounter, at no action cost.

Conqueror's (if you possess it):

  • Conqueror's Haki recharges after 10 minutes instead of once per encounter.
  • The burst radius of Conqueror's Haki increases to 60 feet.
description.gm: Perfected Haki is deliberately powerful — it is the level 20 capstone of this archetype. The critical hit immunity is the standout defensive benefit; communicate clearly to your players that it only applies while Armament Haki is active. True seeing at will is extremely powerful; if it feels like it degrades your encounters, you may rule it functions as 10-minute increments rather than a permanent effect.
